SHOTGUN_SCALPER.note: NEEDS-DEDICATED-GRADER: single-exit doctrine (12-min time stop + chandelier, no runner). grade_observation's TP1+runner model does not fit; fire counts only.

verdict.ORB_RETEST_LONG: FAILS-REAL-FILLS — SPY-space WR 63.1% exp $9.32 (N=65) but real-fills negative/thin. Real-fills ATM exp $-0.86 (N=62, WR 58.1%). OP-16 anchor: WIN-day P&L $31.5, LOSS-day loss $0.0, edge_capture $31.5. ANTI-CORRELATED with J's edge (loses on WIN days / profits on LOSS days).
verdict.DOUBLE_BOTTOM_BASE_QUIET: FAILS-REAL-FILLS — SPY-space WR 47.1% exp $8.9 (N=34) but real-fills negative/thin. Real-fills ATM exp $-14.88 (N=41, WR 43.9%). OP-16 anchor: WIN-day P&L $35.0, LOSS-day loss $0.0, edge_capture $35.0.
verdict.DOUBLE_BOTTOM_MORNING_LOW_VOL: WATCH-ONLY — SPY-space N=19 (<20 gate). Real-fills ATM exp $-3.74 (N=22, WR 54.5%). OP-16 anchor: WIN-day P&L $0.0, LOSS-day loss $0.0, edge_capture $0.0.
verdict.MOMENTUM_ACCELERATION_HIGHVOL: WATCH-ONLY / DO-NOT-PROMOTE — SPY-space WR 25.0% exp $-1.14 (N=44). Real-fills ATM exp $-60.25 (N=34, WR 41.2%). OP-16 anchor: WIN-day P&L $0.0, LOSS-day loss $0.0, edge_capture $0.0.
verdict.RSI_DIVERGENCE_BULL: WATCH-ONLY / DO-NOT-PROMOTE — SPY-space WR 39.5% exp $-0.39 (N=185). Real-fills ATM exp $-2.95 (N=101, WR 41.6%). OP-16 anchor: WIN-day P&L $-17.5, LOSS-day loss $0.0, edge_capture $-17.5. ANTI-CORRELATED with J's edge (loses on WIN days / profits on LOSS days).
verdict.STAIRSTEP_CONTINUATION: WATCH-ONLY / ANCHOR-REGRESSION — SPY-space WR 66.7% exp $1.4 (N=669) and real-fills positive, BUT fails OP-16 anchor gate. Real-fills ATM exp $4.11 (N=113, WR 68.1%). OP-16 anchor: WIN-day P&L $-345.3, LOSS-day loss $19.5, edge_capture $-364.8. ANTI-CORRELATED with J's edge (loses on WIN days / profits on LOSS days). Mechanical gates pass; edge-alignment fails — DO NOT promote.
verdict.SHOTGUN_SCALPER: NEEDS-DEDICATED-GRADER — single-exit doctrine (12-min time stop + chandelier, no runner); grade_observation's TP1+runner model does not fit. Over-fires ~35x/day.

MOMENTUM_ACCELERATION_HIGHVOL.agreement: AGREE — both DEGRADED (real WR ~41-43%, negative expectancy). My exp is harsher (full ctx pipeline + 120-cap).

DOUBLE_BOTTOM_BASE_QUIET.agreement: DISAGREE — existing FAVORABLE (+$14/trade, WR 63.9%) OMITS the NOT_NEAR_NAMED proximity filter (N=122); my full-pipeline replay APPLIES it and flips NEGATIVE (-$14.88, WR 43.9%, N=41). The proximity filter is doing real work — the simplified scan overstated edge.

DOUBLE_BOTTOM_MORNING_LOW_VOL.agreement: PARTIAL — existing FAVORABLE (+$7.6/trade, WR 67.9%, N=109, NOT_NEAR_NAMED omitted). My full-pipeline real-fills WR 54.5% but exp -$3.74 (N=22). SPY-space stays strong (WR 73.7%); real-fills slips with the proximity filter + small N. WATCH_FRAGILE (walk-forward already DEGRADED -15.2pp).

ORB_RETEST_LONG.agreement: CONSISTENT DIRECTION — existing v2 chart-stop FAIL (<50% gate in some variants); my full-window real-fills ATM is ~breakeven (exp -$0.86, WR 58.1%, N=62). Both say ORB long is NOT a clean real-fills win. My SPY-space proxy (63.1%) is lower than their 79.8% OOS proxy because I run the full state machine over ALL days incl. narrow-OR gate.

promotion_priority.note: NEEDS-DEDICATED-GRADER — not rankable until single-exit grader exists. Fires ~35x/day (12,667 over 361 days) — over-firing, matches WATCH_FRAGILE -$1.63/obs.

data_source_per_watcher.ORB_RETEST_LONG: Price structure only (opening range H/L + SMA10/50 from day_bars). No disk-state look-ahead. Long-only via ORB_DIRECTION_FILTER; MAX_OR_RANGE=2.00 narrow-OR gate active.
data_source_per_watcher.DOUBLE_BOTTOM_BASE_QUIET: ctx.prior_bars sliding window (double_bottom_detector) + VIX<20 + conf<0.60 + NOT_NEAR_NAMED via ctx.levels_active (historical levels). No disk look-ahead.
data_source_per_watcher.DOUBLE_BOTTOM_MORNING_LOW_VOL: Same as BASE_QUIET + MORNING 09:35-11:30 window. No disk look-ahead.
data_source_per_watcher.MOMENTUM_ACCELERATION_HIGHVOL: ctx.prior_bars (momentum_acceleration) + ribbon ALIGNED + VIX>=20. No disk look-ahead.
data_source_per_watcher.RSI_DIVERGENCE_BULL: RSI(14) computed from ctx.prior_bars closes each bar; stateless except cooldown. No disk look-ahead.
data_source_per_watcher.STAIRSTEP_CONTINUATION: LOOK-AHEAD TRAP in production: reads automation/state/key-levels.json (TODAY's live levels). FIXED HERE by monkeypatching _load_named_levels to historical ★★+ levels per bar-date (_detect_from_history). Roles (broken_to_*) unavailable historically -> runs on intraday-break fallback path only; role-confirmed 'high' confidence is unreachable in this replay. CAVEAT: the historical level set is computed once at each day's FIRST RTH bar, so today's session-H/L levels are as-of day-open, not as-of-bar (a minor staleness, conservative — fewer levels). The intraday-break detection itself uses clean ctx.prior_bars (no look-ahead).
data_source_per_watcher.SHOTGUN_SCALPER: Reads key-levels.json AND auto-derives intraday levels from the bar window (auto_derive_intraday_levels=True). Partially self-sufficient. Single-exit doctrine -> not graded here.

op20_disclosures.look_ahead_audit: ORB / double_bottom / momentum / rsi confirmed free of disk-state look-ahead (all read ctx.prior_bars <= current bar + historically-rebuilt levels). STAIRSTEP's production key-levels.json read is a genuine look-ahead trap, neutralized here via historical-level monkeypatch. SHOTGUN's key-levels read not exercised for grading.
op20_disclosures.grading_model: grade_observation: 50% qty TP1 + 50% runner-to-BE, same-day future bars to 15:50 ET, $ per 1 SPY contract (SPY move * 100). SPY-space proxy WR != real option P&L (see real_fills).
op20_disclosures.real_fills_model: simulator_real.simulate_trade_real over OPRA bars (valid through 2026-05-29; later signals yield no fill and are dropped). chart-stop only (premium_stop_pct=-0.99 per L51/L55). qty=3. ATM (strike_offset=0) reported for all; ITM2 (strike_offset=-2) for streams that can take either side. Capped at first 120 signals/stream for runtime. NOTE: real-fills N counts RAW signals (pre-dedup, OPRA-available), so it can exceed the SPY-space DEDUPED N (which collapses same-date/dir/conf). Compare WR/exp, not N directly.
op20_disclosures.anchor_gate: OP-16: positive capture on WIN anchors (4/29, 5/01, 5/04), no/low loss on LOSS anchors (5/05, 5/06, 5/07). See anchor_days block.
op20_disclosures.cross_check: ORB cross-checked vs analysis/recommendations/orb_real_fills.json; double-bottom variants vs db-base-quiet-real-fills.json / db-morning-lowvol-real-fills.json; momentum vs momentum-accel-highvol-real-fills.json. Differences expected because those scans use simplified filters (e.g. NOT_NEAR_NAMED omitted) and curated test pools; this is a full ctx-pipeline replay.
op20_disclosures.concentration_caveat: Per-quarter breakdown discloses regime concentration; a stream whose positive expectancy is one-quarter-driven is regime-fragile (cf. ORB 2026-Q2 concentration in orb_real_fills.json).
